name: rpglitch-perchance
description: RPGlitch - AI-powered storytelling platform for Perchance with comprehensive rules system for development

scripts.preflight: npm run build && npm run lint && echo "Preflight check complete (tests and typecheck not configured)."
scripts.deploy: npm run build && echo '✅ Build complete! Copy build/output/RPGlitch-perchance.html to Perchance.'
scripts.rules:update: echo 'Use "update memory bank" to refresh memory bank files'

author: John G
